name: git-workflow
appliesWhen: agent role is senior-dev OR any task that commits code

officialRepos.name: conventional-commits/conventionalcommits.org
officialRepos.why: The Conventional Commits specification source. Canonical type/scope/breaking-change format.

officialRepos.name: semver/semver
officialRepos.why: Semantic Versioning spec. Defines MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH and pre-release semantics.

officialRepos.name: lint-staged/lint-staged
officialRepos.why: Run linters/formatters on staged files in pre-commit hooks.

officialRepos.name: evilmartians/lefthook
officialRepos.why: Fast, language-agnostic Git hooks manager for lint/format/typecheck gates.

officialRepos.name: gitleaks/gitleaks
officialRepos.why: Secret scanning to block credentials/.env from ever being committed.

officialRepos.name: googleapis/release-please
officialRepos.why: Automated changelogs and SemVer bumps driven by Conventional Commits.
